backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core types (UserProfile, Trip, TripRequest, PricingConfig, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app including user roles, trip management, and pricing configuration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two dashboard restoration features (Customer 'My Trips' and Driver 'My Trips' tab) to their respective frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Namma Driver Pilot', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, renders the AppShell with navigation and profile setup modal, and conditionally shows an OfflineBanner based on backend health.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin trips table component with search filtering, displaying trip ID, customer/driver principals, pickup/dropoff locations, timestamps, status badges, and fare using data from useGetAllTrips.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, filterable table of all users with their name, email, role badge, and join date, fetched via the useGetAllUsers hook.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps protected routes and waits up to 5 seconds for Internet Identity to resolve, redirecting unauthenticated users to /login and showing a spinner while checking.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of requested trips available for drivers to accept, with pickup/dropoff details and an accept button that calls the useAcceptTrip mutation.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with status badges, vehicle type, pickup/dropoff locations, and timestamps fetched via useGetMyTrips.
frontend/src/components/DataLoadErrorBan: Displays a dismissible error banner with a page-refresh button when data fails to load.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Renders a driver's profile card showing duty status, service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, and languages, with an edit button to open the edit flow.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Displays a driver's trip list grouped by status, with a 'Complete Trip' button for accepted trips that calls the useCompleteTrip mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: A form component for editing a driver's profile, including service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, availability, and languages, with save functionality via the upsertDriverProfile mutation.
A modal dialog wrapper around EditDriverProfileForm that normalizes the incoming profile and handles open/close state.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with Retry and Reset App options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A page layout component that wraps content with a Navigation header and a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A sticky top navigation bar showing the app logo, role-based dashboard link, backend health status (dev only), and login/logout controls.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: A dismissible sticky banner that alerts users when the backend is unreachable.
frontend/src/components/PricingTab.tsx: An admin-only tab component for viewing and updating the platform's pricing configuration, including local, outstation, vehicle multiplier, and commission settings.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's full name and email and saves them via the setProfile actor call, blocking dismissal until complete.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and renders children only when authenticated.
A form component for creating ride/trip requests, supporting local/outstation trip types, manual/GPS pickup location, vehicle selection, and contact details, which submits via the useCreateTrip mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: A route guard component that checks authentication and the user's backend role, redirecting unauthenticated users to /login, showing a spinner or error/retry UI during loading, and rendering children only when the required role matches.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: A modal dialog that lets a newly authenticated user choose between Customer and Driver roles, calling the appropriate mutation and navigating to the corresponding dashboard on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes and invalidating all dependent queries on actor updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealth.ts: A hook that calls the backend ping() method via the actor to determine if the backend canister is reachable, returning health status and a loading flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across page reloads and exposing login/logout functions and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks and mutations for backend interactions including user profile fetching, role management (get/set customer/driver), trip creation, pricing config, and driver profile operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/lib/defaultConfig.ts: Exports a DEFAULT_CONFIG constant of type PricingConfig used as a fallback when the backend pricing configuration is unavailable or loading.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines all frontend domain types (AppRole, TripStatus, UserProfile, Trip, etc.) and a helper function getRoleString to extract a role string from a Candid optional variant.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying identity info, user/trip stats, and tabbed management sections for users, trips, and pricing configuration.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page allowing a user to enter an admin setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role, with error handling and navigation on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing the ride request form and the customer's trip list side by side, with principal ID display and error banner.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page displaying the driver's profile, an edit profile modal, and tabbed views for available trips and the driver's own trips.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Root landing page that acts as a router, redirecting authenticated users to the appropriate dashboard or onboarding flow based on their role and profile state.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that presents an Internet Identity sign-in button and redirects already-authenticated users to the post-login flow.
frontend/src/pages/NotAuthorizedPage.tsx: Displays a 403-style 'Not Authorized' page with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the home route.
Post-login redirect page that fetches the user's role and navigates to the appropriate dashboard (admin/customer/driver) or to role selection if no role is assigned.
frontend/src/pages/SelectRolePage.tsx: Allows a newly authenticated user to select either a Customer or Driver role, then navigates to the corresponding dashboard; also handles logout and redirects users who already have a role.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeProfile.ts: Provides utility functions to normalize Candid variant array fields (vehicleExperience, transmissionComfort, languages) on a UserProfile into plain string arrays.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/withTimeout.ts: Wraps a promise with a configurable timeout, rejecting with a TimeoutError if the timeout expires before the promise resolves.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, fonts, container settings, accordion keyframes, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Namma Driver Pilot' describing pending feature requests to restore Customer and Driver Dashboard 'My Trips' sections and fix available trips filtering.
